chunks.title: Introduction to Sunning
chunks.summary: The discussion begins with a question about the practice of sunning male genitalia and its potential benefits. The speaker references research from the 1930s that investigates the effects of ultraviolet (UV) radiation on male sex hormone levels.
chunks.transcript: sunning your uh junk uh sunning my balls is there any research supporting tanning naked or putting my testicles my balls in the sun well i think this is a fascinating question glad charles asked this question and there's actually some pretty interesting research from the 1930s

chunks.title: Research Findings on Androsterone
chunks.summary: The speaker delves into a study examining androsterone concentrations when different body parts are exposed to UV light. It is noted that irradiating the genital area significantly elevates androsterone levels compared to other body regions.
chunks.transcript: on this question that i'm going to show you guys so the title of the article is the influence of ultraviolet radiation upon the excretion of male sex hormones it is from um boston state hospital in boston massachusetts and i believe it is 1939 and if you go to the third or fourth page you can see that they are looking at the androsterone androsterone concentrations the output when they irradiate the chest and the back versus the genital region now i had to look this up i didn't learn about androsterone androsterone in medical school it's not included in most pathways of steroid hormone synthesis but it is a real androgen it has about 1 7th the energetic activity of testosterone and it's thought to possibly be a pheromone as well so they were looking at androsterone androsterone concentrations and as you can see from this graphic that five irradiations of the general region elevated androsterone significantly higher and for a significantly longer time than irradiations of the chest that's pretty interesting maybe there's something to butthole taint genital sunning they've done other experiments here which looked at the same thing uh six irradiations of the general region for androsterone concentrations uh versus the radiation to the chest now it's important to note that irradiating the chest and back basically getting a large amount of your skin surface area in the sun does appear to improve levels of androgens testosterone sex hormones in general but this study i wish we would repeat this this study suggests that actually sunning your junk find a place where you're not going to get arrested and don't get burned could increase at least this acid androgen androstendrosterone androcerone could ask could increase this acid androgen androsterone significantly more than the chest and the back that's interesting to me especially because

chunks.title: Practical Takeaways on Ultraviolet Light
chunks.summary: The speaker emphasizes the benefits of natural sunlight over vitamin D supplements, highlighting various hormonal and health benefits associated with UV exposure, including effects on gut flora. He also cautions viewers about vitamin D winter and the geographical implications.
chunks.transcript: get real ultraviolet light don't just get a vitamin d pill there are many benefits to vitamin d we know this i think that making vitamin d in your skin from ultraviolet light from the sun is better you get more nitric oxide you get nitric oxide in general you get endorphins both of those have positive effects in humans in training your circadian rhythm and perhaps there are all of these hormonal benefits in fact we know there are hormonal benefits from ultraviolet light on the skin that you don't get from a vitamin d pill necessarily and in studies looking at the gut flora we've seen that ultraviolet light can help modulate the gut flora in apparently a positive way by increasing alpha diversity so lots of benefits to real ultraviolet light the caveat question always comes up but paul i live in a place where i can't get ultraviolet light for part of the year so you shouldn't know wherever you live what latitude at what part of the year we you will encounter a vitamin d winter quote unquote at what part of the year your body will no longer be able to make vitamin d in the skin or the precursors of vitamin d in the skin from the sun because the angle of the sun is too low you can find that information very easily online but i believe that anything basically above phoenix arizona is going to have some degree of a vitamin d winter when i did my residency at the university of washington in seattle there was a long period of the year probably from november to about early march or mid-march where i was not making any vitamin d in my skin of any significant amount when it was exposed to uv light

chunks.title: Considerations of Tanning Beds
chunks.summary: The discussion covers the use of tanning beds as an alternative for obtaining UV light during winter months when natural sunlight is insufficient. The speaker addresses misconceptions about tanning beds causing cancer and shares his personal experiences with gradual exposure.
